name: goth-showcase-e2e
description: ui/goth three-engine Playwright + axe accessibility/interaction harness (GOTH-1.5). Node-gated: runs behind `make test-ui-browser`, never in the hermetic `make check` loop. axe-core (MPL-2.0) lives ONLY in this dev toolchain and is never imported by ui/goth or embedded into assets/dist.
